watchlist.context: indie film evenings, after long tastings

preferences.note: Slow evenings only. Wine business stays off the screen.

title.name: The Long Harvest
title.reason: Piedmont vineyard family saga, useful before the fall sourcing trip

title.name: A Table in Burgundy
title.reason: Sommelier character study, recommended by David Kim

title.name: Coast Road North
title.reason: Quiet road film, paired well with a glass of Barolo

title.name: Salt and Sail
title.reason: Documentary on bay sailing, light Sunday watch

title.name: Brunello
title.reason: Montalcino producer profile, background for the Tuscan leg

title.name: The Equestrian
title.reason: For a weekend with Emily after a horse show
